title: MCBR Cobblemon - Mobile
description: A dedicated modpack for our Cobblemon server.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18151a71ab32fd82ea3292e11af46bbdf58d3658_0.webp)

If you're looking for the definitive **Cobblemon** survival experience, you've come to the right place. Welcome to the official modpack for MinecraftBrasil! We know how important it is to have a game that looks amazing but still runs smoothly, so we've put together a carefully curated, lightweight Fabric modpack centered around the incredible world of Pokémon.

It's designed to give you the highest FPS, incredible audiovisual immersion, and essential quality-of-life features—all while seamlessly integrating Cobblemon into that classic Minecraft feel. Check out all the details below and join our community!

Welcome to our Minecraft server! Our modpack offers an enhanced "Cobblemon+" experience. Come and have hours of fun playing survival, catching and training your favorite Pokémon, all while keeping the classic essence of the game with maximum performance and immersion.

# What our modpack does:

Designed to run smoothly even on lower-end computers, this modpack was carefully assembled with a focus on optimization, player convenience, and audiovisual improvements, ensuring your Pokémon journey is as seamless as possible without overloading the game with heavy content mods.

# Why you should download our modpack:

- **The Ultimate Cobblemon Experience:** Catch, battle, and trade Pokémon that are beautifully integrated into the Minecraft ecosystem with highly detailed models and smooth animations.
- **Extreme Performance:** Say goodbye to lag and stuttering! Our pack includes the best Fabric performance mods, such as Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore, ensuring high FPS and much smoother gameplay.
- **Quality of Life:** Your journey as a Pokémon Trainer will be much more practical with a minimap (JourneyMap), proximity voice chat (VoiceChat), and even native controller support (Controlify).

# What you need to know before downloading:

Our modpack is focused on the perfect balance between Cobblemon and the Vanilla+ experience. This means we avoid bloating the game with complex tech or magic systems. The goal is to enhance your adventure, making catching Pokémon, exploring the world, and building your base more beautiful, faster, and much more rewarding.
